name: Nursery
description: A small children's bedroom. Contains a single (child-sized) bed against a wall, a toy chest, 1-2 stairs blocks acting as pint-sized chairs, a small picture-book bookshelf, a cake as a stuffed-animal/toy display proxy, a bright play-mat carpet, at least one flower pot, two or more warm lanterns, and a small window. The ceiling is left open as beams.

required_furniture.rule: single bed against a wall, head toward the north
toy box; on the floor near the foot of the bed
1-2 @stairs blocks acting as child-scale chairs, near the bookshelf
picture books along the wall opposite the bed
proxy for a stuffed animal / toy display, on the south wall
bright play-mat rug in the centre — yellow_carpet (modern), pink_carpet (fantasy), red_carpet (medieval); resolved via style_variants.palette_overrides.carpet
on the floor by the window, or at the bed head
warm light — at least two lanterns hanging from the ceiling beams; never torches
small 1x1 window on the wall opposite the bed

placement_rules: Small bed against a wall (child bed — single block footprint visually).
Soft warm lighting (lanterns not torches), at least two, near the ceiling beams.
Bright carpet rug for play, centred and never under the bed.
Child-scale furniture: stairs blocks as chairs, single bookshelf, single chest.
Window kept small (1×1) and placed on the wall opposite the bed (Light on Two Sides).
Leave the ceiling open: render the roof as Line-op beams between the wall tops.
lighting_ventilation: At least two lanterns hanging from beams for warm, soft light — no torches in a nursery. One small window on the wall opposite the bed; cross-ventilation comes from the bed-wall side at eye height.

medieval.notes: Warm oak nursery with a red bed and red play-mat; oak stair chairs.

modern.notes: Bright, clean quartz nursery with a white bed and yellow play-mat.

fantasy.notes: Storybook dark-oak nursery with a pink bed and pink play-mat.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.nursery.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
